data.title: How Smart Contracts Can Automate Your Path to Financial Freedom
data.description:
Financial freedom is achieved when one attains both financial stability and independence, empowering individuals to make decisions free from monetary constraints. It forms the cornerstone for a life where personal ambitions are realized, unforeseen challenges are managed with resilience, and long-term security is established. In parallel, smart contracts have emerged as a groundbreaking...
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/02/18/how-smart-contracts-can-automate-your-path-to-financial-freedom/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=how-smart-contracts-can-automate-your-path-to-financial-freedom

data.title: JPMorgan Chase: US-listed Bitcoin mining companies accounted for 29% of global hash rate in February
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News JPMorgan Chase tracking data shows that in February, the global hash rate of US-listed Bitcoin mining companies accounted for 29%, almost twice as much as a year ago. The report pointed out that the Bitcoin network hash rate rose by 6% this month. However, JPMorgan Chase said that the daily profitability of crypto mining has dropped by 13% from the end of January. (Coindesk)

data.title: AscendEX will launch Broccoli (BROCCOLI5)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Broccoli (BROCCOLI5) at 21:00 on February 18, opening the BROCCOLI5/USDT trading pair, and deposits are now open.

data.title: Gate.io Launches Rivalz (RIZ) Spot Trading, Launchpool Starts the First Phase of RIZ Mining
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch Rivalz (RIZ) spot trading at 21:00 (UTC+8) on February 21, 2025. At the same time, Gate.io Launchpool will start the first phase of RIZ mining at 21:00 (UTC+8) on February 18, 2025, for a period of 3 days. Users only need to pledge USDT and BTC to earn airdrops every hour. The USDT novice pool is estimated to have an annualized rate of 121.67%, and the minimum pledge is 0.1 USDT to participate. The second phase of mining will be launched simultaneously with RIZ spot trading, supporting users to pledge RIZ and GT to earn airdrops, with an estimated annualized rate of 1703.33%.

data.title: Majority Of Investors View U.S. Stock Valuations As Overpriced
data.description: According to Odaily, a recent global fund manager survey conducted by Bank of America in February revealed that 89% of surveyed investors believe U.S. stock valuations are excessively high. This marks the highest level of concern regarding stock valuations since at least April 2001. Over the past decade, an average of 81% of fund manager investors surveyed have consistently viewed U.S. stock valuations as overvalued.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Supply Barrier At $97,000, Analyst Reports
data.description: According to Odaily, cryptocurrency analyst Ali Martinez stated on the X platform that Bitcoin encounters a significant supply barrier at the $97,000 price level, with 1.88 million coins. In contrast, there is a support level at $94,500 with only 695,000 coins. This imbalance could play a crucial role in Bitcoin's next price movement.

data.title: U.S. And Russia Agree To Form Task Force To Resolve Ukraine Conflict
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 18, market sources reported that the United States and Russia have agreed to establish a task force aimed at resolving the ongoing conflict in Ukraine.

data.title: Opinion: FTX repayment can be seen as a positive sign of crypto industry recovery
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News FTX Digital Markets is the Bahamian subsidiary of the bankrupt cryptocurrency exchange FTX. The company will repay its first batch of creditors on February 18, and this repayment will bring in funds worth about $1.2 billion. Alvin Kan, COO of Bitget Wallet, said that FTX's repayment is seen as a positive sign of the recovery of the crypto industry. He believes that a large part of the $1.2 billion repayment may be reinvested in cryptocurrencies, which may affect market liquidity and prices. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,700 USDT with a Narrowed 2.32% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 18, 2025, 12:33 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,700 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,700.590088 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.32% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Abstract Users Face Targeted Attack, Not A Global Wallet Issue
data.description: According to Odaily, developer 0xBeans reported that some Abstract users have been targeted by an attack. However, this issue does not appear to be a network-wide problem with the Abstract Global Wallet (AGW). The issue seems to be isolated to a specific application, possibly Cardex, and users are advised to avoid interactions with it for the time being. Efforts are underway to determine the cause of the problem. It is reiterated that this is not a global AGW issue but rather a problem with a particular application. Further updates will be provided as the investigation continues.
